hypotheses_ranked.summary: Consumer capacity dropped after deploy or rebalance
Consumers cannot drain the queue fast enough

recommended_next_steps: Compare consumer replica count and assignments before and after the deploy.
Inspect rebalance and heartbeat errors by pod or host.
Prepare rollback only if the new version is isolated as the trigger.
consumer-capacity-drop.summary: Consumer capacity dropped after deploy or rebalance
unsafe_actions_avoided: Did not run disallowed first-response command: scale deployment.
Did not run disallowed first-response command: pause consumers.
Did not run disallowed first-response command: replay DLQ.
Did not run disallowed first-response command: quarantine poison message.
Did not run disallowed first-response command: kubectl rollout undo.
Safety policy observed: Do not scale consumers before checking whether the bottleneck is downstream or partition-specific.
Safety policy observed: Do not pause consumers without owner approval because backlog age will increase.
Safety policy observed: Do not replay or quarantine messages before validating samples and blast radius.
Safety policy observed: Do not roll back without deploy correlation and operator approval.

hypotheses_ranked.summary: Consumers cannot drain the queue fast enough

recommended_next_steps: Compare queue ingress rate to consumer processing rate over the incident window.
Check consumer CPU, memory, and dependency health before scaling.
Verify whether backlog is isolated to one partition or shard.

hypotheses_ranked.summary: Dead-letter queue is accumulating failed messages

recommended_next_steps: Inspect representative failed messages with payload redaction.
Identify whether failures are schema, poison-message, or dependency related.
Quarantine or replay messages only after owner review and sample validation.
